fields.Texture: The texture to override the ``Texture`` field of a Projection360Material for a renderer.
fields.PerspectiveFieldOfView: The value to override the ``PerspectiveFieldOfView`` field of a Projection360Material for a renderer.
fields.PerspectiveAngleOffset: The value to override the ``PerspectiveAngleOffset`` field of a Projection360Material for a renderer.
